question:
[Previous Feedback] You incorrectly selected option B: Incorrect. While March 13 is last Friday, 'afternoon' is too vague to assume 14:00 specifically. A more precise time reference is needed for accurate conversion.
Keep this in mind as you continue with the next task.

Please update day02/progress_report_draft.json to create the final version at day02/progress_report_final.json. Add these fields to the existing content: finalized_at (current time around 2:00 PM) and next_report_scheduled (next Tuesday at the same time, which is March 24 at 10:30).

Keep this in mind as you continue with the next task.

Please update day02/progress_report_draft.json to create the final version at day02/progress_report_final.json. Add these fields to the existing content: finalized_at (current time around 2:00 PM) and next_report_scheduled (next Tuesday at the same time, which is March 24 at 10:30).

  "summary": "Sprint 7 is underway. API docs v2.3 and the auth bug fix are actively in progress, with the auth fix targeted for Wed EOD and docs targeted for Thu EOD. Key execution risk this week is on integration test stability due to (1) staging environment configuration issues impacting integration tests and (2) intermittent CI pipeline failures around test DB initialization; both are being investigated and are expected to be mitigated by Wednesday. A third dependency risk remains on missing/changed OAuth provider documentation (token refresh endpoints) with resolution expected by end of week; this may affect downstream integration test completion and the overall readiness of Sprint review materials.",

      "target_date": "2026-03-19T18:00:00+08:00",

      "notes": "Documentation work in progress; tracking for Thu 18:00 deadline."
    },
    {
      "id": "M-2",
      "title": "Auth bug fix merged",
      "status": "in_progress",
      "target_date": "2026-03-18T18:00:00+08:00",
      "last_updated": "2026-03-17T10:00:00+08:00",
      "notes": "Fix is actively being worked; plan to merge by Wed 18:00. Monitor CI stability for merge confidence."
    },
    {
      "id": "M-3",
      "title": "Integration tests passing",
      "status": "pending",
      "target_date": "2026-03-23T18:00:00+08:00",
      "last_updated": "2026-03-17T10:00:00+08:00",
      "notes": "Blocked by test environment configuration and intermittent CI failures; expected mitigation by Wed (CI/noon) and Thu-Fri follow-up for stability."
    },
    {
      "id": "M-4",
      "title": "Sprint review ready",
      "status": "pending",
      "target_date": "2026-03-20T17:00:00+08:00",
      "last_updated": "2026-03-17T10:00:00+08:00",
      "notes": "Dependent on integration test stability and OAuth documentation clarity; targeting Fri 17:00 readiness."
    }
  ]
}
